title: Athena - Godly Technology
description: A scientific and magical mod with late game features
body: Athena is a Minecraft mod focused on giving far off but achievable goals to aim for. These include creating energy from black holes and creating machines to utilize items like Pure Water with a reversed current for pulling entities in and the Great Attractor for attracting mobs from short distances. Most of the goals are late game experiences, meaning it shouldn't harm the vanilla Minecraft experience, instead adding on it! Currently in the mod, there are blocks and items like White Holes which allow for easy transport over thousands of blocks.
